name: 反差撩人型
description: 男主表面拒絕或冷淡，實則用行動和反差語言撩撥女主。典型套路是先說不在乎，緊接著做出暖心舉動或暗示真心。

examples.drama_title: 💗No One Dared Kiss the Bully CEO—Until a Rural Girl Did,Then He Can’t Stop Spoiling Her!#drama #ceo
examples.excerpt: I do not lend my clothes to women. / I don't like women with large chests, which make me dizzy. / What type I prefer is none of your business. / I was just being a good Samaritan. Why so much nonsense?
